name: @tank/ghostty
description: Ghostty terminal config, themes, keybindings, shell integration. 500+ themes with light/dark switching, custom theme authoring, full keybind catalog (splits, tabs, search, quick terminal, key tables), shell integration for zsh/bash/fish, SSH/sudo wrapping, macOS vs Linux differences, migration from iTerm2/kitty/alacritty/WezTerm. Triggers: ghostty config, ghostty theme, ghostty keybind, ghostty split, ghostty font, ghostty quick terminal, configure ghostty, ghostty ssh, migrate to ghostty
